hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(printf '%s' "$input" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('command',''))"); if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE '(--no-verify|git reset --hard|git clean -[fdx]|rm -rf)'; then printf '{"decision":"block","reason":"Dangerous destructive command blocked. Confirm intent with user before proceeding."}'; exit 2; fi

printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"Stop","additionalContext":"Before finishing: run chezmoi status to confirm working tree is clean, confirm all changes are committed and pushed to github.com/ismail-kattakath/dotfiles, and verify the task is complete."}}'
